hae4e2eb1gf9a0g41e0g8536ga47300db32e4: *The owlbear growls deep in its feathered chest - you had your chance.*
h2c6575abg4101g484ag9abdg9defc855a95f: I warned you, softmeat. You don't listen.
hde875db8g2de8g497fgba9bg4f93dc5c4742: *You feel the quake of its heavy footsteps before you see it: an owlbear, its beaked face looming out of the darkness.*
ha7a353a0gbe4eg4266g98a5g247d68e19bc6: What's this? Something weak, something tender...
h1c1b99c2g947bg46dbga3e3geb13ef3a601a: Won't even have to chew you before I feed you to my son, softmeat.
h22fdbd61ga392g40degbfb0g0b0055b5f098: You're injured - there's still half a spear lodged in your head.
h3329ed14g647cg451agad5eg57a1a54267fc: It's a splinter. I've gutted bigger threats than you with worse.
h7000de25g5913g4649ga7c5g481dee68581a: Sorry - wrong cave. I'll be going.
h08921613g5a62g4d0agb8c3g146d26ecc036: Stop! One more step and I'll rip your throat out.
h8d75213ag6c73g4742g972fgb88693a0d0f4: Oh yes? What're you waiting for?
hdd214b81g0ef9g4906gad65g3e5479408446: My cub must learn how to deal with a threat. How to make it fear.
h8bdf26d7g8714g4b6aga11fg88875c0592a6: The meat tastes better when it's afraid.
ha941d184gfe95g4c9cg9af6gcb7a08f5856c: Let me go, or you'll watch your cub die before I finish you.
h70a0bef4g386ag4ba1ga6fdg80c0c2d677bd: Brave. Stupid, but brave. And I'm too tired to deal with brave.
ha8a61353ge525g4678g840eg5cd3a4c0b530: I'll tear you in half before you touch a feather on his head.
hb818839bgd22bg44a7g994bg860aa2c63065: Just allow me to leave. I'm no threat to you or your cub.
h63dc0752ge88ag4a30ga07eg925aa414e294: You're small. Weak. Killing you would be a waste of time.
hb092ddb1g639eg41ceg9013gd0bf1d82d8c6: You can go. But you make one wrong step, and I'll rip you to shreds.
h091b4b03gdda8g447dgbfa4g8c2a8667a8c9: You'll be even less of a threat when you're in pieces.
hba89e737g10b1g4134gbca3gc77f33f9e0d3: You need rest - let nature heal you. This is no time for a fight.
hd10a14a9g496dg4a41g8aaeg62707ec029e7: A fight? You'd be a plaything - not worth the trouble.
h4a783efegd7ffg4b66gb121g7cfce2975dc4: Thanks to you, I'm healed enough to cut you from belly to snout.
h533538c8gacfdg4d4fg887cg2ca8c964ba0a: I've still got one good eye. That's all I need.
hdbb63082g2dcdg4142g8ea4gc6e97d1234df: I would never intrude on your nest knowingly. This was a simple mistake.
h67a13b4dgaeeeg4e07g9870g5df387ceb80f: A mistake that would cost your life - if you posed any real danger.
h12bbbb71g05dcg449fg8a7dga92c06457541: No need for that - I'll just leave.
hc8cb1bf9g4cc7g4c07ga083g923df336d624: I don't think so. You've seen my nest. You've seen my cub.
hb1482716ga5e3g4ba7g8d94g210121748c65: That makes you dangerous. An easy meal.
hea6aa2d7g7a02g4b52g8d7egca15bafb120a: Should've listened when you had the chance.
h91b82a3ag3dc5g406egb104g9a774fdc22f0: That eye - or lack of it - must have you in a lot of pain. I should know.
hf8066670ge4d4g49acgbf85g71beaf639906: Scars don't make us kindred, softmeat. And they don't make you welcome in my nest.
h28a2c98dg0c7fg473dgb094gae05aa16e899: You'll be missing more than your eye before I'm done.
hfa103235g8435g443eg926eg2ac36d046368: You've had your last meal, beast. You and your cub alike.
h75f45771g4af0g4974g888fg47a8a7dfdf07: *The owlbear glances quickly back, then squares its gaze at you. You follow its glance...*
h26de6916ged0ag4ff5g8ef1gd497a5c23d1e: Hold out your palms - you mean no harm.
h6a72eb54g3cbbg450eg973bgf0a9f15fe1ec: *The owlbear stares, then sharply inhales your scent.*
hf0295033g151cg40fbg9ac8g57ac588db890: *It sits back, its eyes still fixed on you. A silent ultimatum...*
hb6f4f754g84c1g4ad2gb33bg4c89025a9589: *...you can leave now, or step closer and die.*
h5fecebc8g63ceg4103gba40g569778bcde13: *It sits back, its eye still fixed on you. A silent ultimatum...*
he7404d33ga086g48d1gaa99g46f547d33c8c: *A bloodthirsty screech erupts from the owlbear's throat.*
h24330167ge310g439cgb09ag11d49a51618a: *As you retreat, the owlbear let's out a short huff. The message is clear...*
h6829b651gc319g4684g9125gfc692fc0867c: *The owlbear's one good eye flicks away for a moment. You follow its glance...*
h56de2b0cg12f5g45e6ga269ge9db82cff2e3: *You can only surmise the obvious - the owlbear is out for blood.*
he89d8a7eg3899g4881g823fg6f8835d8faf7: *The owlbear stares, but doesn't move to attack. The way out seems clear.*
h7611758dg097fg4b74gbb16gd47f04cc1f45: *The owlbear's talons flash, primed to attack.*
h56275ba2gf998g4a10ga1a5ge6db41afd9f9: *The beast returns the roar in kind.*
